name: akx-ai
description: AKX AI — unified full-stack AI chat application

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend/gateway && npm install --prefix backend/services/auth && npm install --prefix backend/services/chat && npm install --prefix backend/services/agent && npm install --prefix backend/services/billing && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build:gateway: npm install --prefix backend/gateway && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.build:prod: npm install --prefix backend/gateway && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.preview: npm run build && npm run start
